articles.title: LeBron James and Lakers Showcase Clutch Performance in Game 3 Win

articles.summary: Los Angeles defeated their opponent in Game 3 thanks to several late‑game heroics from LeBron James. The veteran led the Lakers on a decisive run in the final minutes, cementing a crucial series advantage. The win highlighted the team's ability to execute under pressure.
key_points: LeBron scored key points in the closing minutes, including a go‑ahead basket.
Lakers outscored the opposition 15‑4 in the final stretch to secure the victory.
The performance moved the Lakers ahead in the series, giving them a 2‑1 lead.

articles.title: Lakers Edge Rockets 112‑108 in Tight Contest

articles.summary: Los Angeles held off Houston with a four‑point margin, finishing 112‑108. The game featured multiple lead changes and strong contributions from the Lakers' starters. The win added another victory to the Lakers' season record.
key_points: Lakers posted 112 points, shooting efficiently in the fourth quarter.
Houston kept the game close, trailing by only two points late in the game.
Key contributors included LeBron James and a solid bench effort.

articles.title: Lakers Defeat Rockets 107‑98 on the Road
articles.original_title: Houston Rockets 98 - Los Angeles Lakers 107: Final score, results, recap, box score, stats - Yahoo Sports

key_points: Lakers held the Rockets to 98 points, ranking among the lower scoring outputs of the season.
LeBron James led the scoring effort for Los Angeles.
The victory marked the Lakers' third consecutive win.

key_points: U.S. sanctions on Rwanda’s military led to a BAL team’s withdrawal.

NBA officials may need to reassess international collaborations amid geopolitical pressures.
